name: Festive Chicken Salad Log
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the cream cheese, mayonnaise, lemon juice, salt, ground ginger, and pepper.
2. Add red pepper sauce to the mixture and stir until well combined.
3. Mix in the finely cut-up cooked chicken, chopped hard-cooked eggs, and sliced green onions.
4. Shape the mixture into a log measuring approximately 8 inches long and 2 inches wide.
5. Wrap the log tightly in plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 4 hours to allow it to firm up.
6. Once chilled, carefully cut each green pepper ring into thin strips.
7. Place the strips diagonally across the log, dividing it into four sections.
8. Sprinkle one of the following toppings on each section:
- Green pepper rings
- Toasted sesame seeds
- Chopped green onions or pimentos
- Chopped ripe olives and pimientos
9. Serve the chicken salad log with crackers.
Makes about 10-12 servings.
Note: The toppings are optional but can enhance the presentation of this dish. It is also delicious simply mounded in a serving dish without them.
